summary: Build 7 Scheduler testing complete — all 21 tests pass. 9 CRON jobs verified in startup log, all job functions execute without crash (no API key = log only), PTP follow-up works, CFO alertas estado='nueva' verified, exact message texts verified, resumen_semanal_ceo is 206 chars (< 450), and all 3 backend APIs return 200 with auth.

minor.issue: Response wraps config under {'ok':true,'config':{...}} not at root level — minor inconsistency for clients expecting flat response

critical_code_review_comments: verificar_alertas_cfo (CRON 3): when whatsapp_activo=True and API key is present, it calls enviar_whatsapp() directly (not via _wa() helper), so if WA DNS fails it could propagate exceptions — but the outer try/except catches it, so no crash risk
resumen_semanal_ceo: calls enviar_whatsapp() directly instead of _wa() helper for consistency
recordatorio_preventivo message hardcodes 'mañana miércoles' — this is correct for the Tuesday cron but the day name is hardcoded not computed dynamically
seed_data_creation: Temporary test docs inserted and cleaned up: TEST_PTP_7C1 in loanbook, TEST_ALERTA_7C2 in cfo_alertas
mocked_apis: Mercately outbound WhatsApp (DNS restriction in preview) — MOCKED/unavailable, jobs handle gracefully
context_for_next_testing_agent: Build 7 fully tested. 9 scheduler jobs confirmed. All functions run without crash. PTP follow-up, CFO alertas estado='nueva', exact message texts all verified. APIs work with Bearer auth token (key='token' in login response). cfo/config POST response structure: {ok:true, config:{...}}.
